cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Skills are folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude loads dynamically to improve performance on specialized tasks.
Each skill is self-contained in its own folder with a `SKILL.md` file containing the instructions and metadata that Claude uses.

The frontmatter requires only two fields:
- `name` - A unique identifier for your skill (lowercase, hyphens for spaces)
- `description` - A complete description of what the skill does and when to use it
